title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, York, Atlas, Sanji, Kid, Lilith as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: mhhmm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: that hit the spot!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: So sleepy..)

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: Gotta punch somethin' to help me digest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dr. York's on today's 4th S.D.M Cycle (snack- dump-nap)!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's enough, Seraphim!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: I'm Dr. vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Return!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Shaka.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Him? I can't move!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, Dr. Edison is prepping for another experiment!

dialogue.speaker: Shaka
dialogue.text: Edison, Lilth, pythagoras!

dialogue.speaker: Lucci
dialogue.text: You must be the straw hat pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Carry over all the materials Dr. Pythons needs!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Get to Simulation Room 88!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's us....!! What the hell did you do to our shoes? They're stuck to the floor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So you're saying resistance is futile then...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Aww, what a shame.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know better than to let my guard down around pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Eureka!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, did I forget to mention I'm vegapunk too...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course that scoundrel butts in when things finally get good!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dom shoes can be magnetically disabled at any point while in the laboratory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Would you cut it out?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, we've already met two vegapunks! That woman and the other one on the speaker.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think this island looks like the future?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, but I am also vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's beyond the future! I mean, just look at those mecha sea beasts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's also vega force 01, and the island Aircon too! This is as futuristic as it gets!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck? Could some- thing like this really move...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Check it out, Chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can tell 'cause it's all rusted and stuff!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's real metal, not another holo-holo thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Woah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it could... how is that level of tech possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...for something so ancient looking?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What do you mean by "past"?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, what if I were to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That long ago, there was once a highly advanced kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never seen anything like this place before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For real! What kinda goodies are you making here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna take a full tour to take it all in! There's no way you and I wouldn't get along!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You feel me, vega-chan? (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's actually quite the contrary.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This is an island of the past...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...not unlike egghead when it comes to technology.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I wanna ride it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A civilization from 900 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Would you believe me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What was the world like back then...?

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 51 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
